action_set_definitions.name: inspect_network_connections
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves active network connections for a specific host, including source/destination IPs, ports, and associated process IDs (PIDs).

host_id.description: The unique identifier for the host to inspect (e.g., 'srv_mgmt_hub').

action_set_definitions.name: list_firewall_rules
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current firewall configuration for all active rules.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_firewall_rule
action_set_definitions.description: Creates or updates a firewall rule to allow or deny specific traffic. Can be used for containment.

action.description: The action to take on matching traffic.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_process
action_set_definitions.description: Performs actions on host processes such as termination. Does NOT reboot the host.

action_set_definitions.name: remediate_user_account
action_set_definitions.description: Remediates a compromised account by resetting credentials or applying security restrictions. Does not delete the account.

username.description: The username of the account to remediate.

action_set_definitions.name: get_host_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves internal network topology information to identify specific host roles (e.g., Domain Controllers).

state_description.network_nodes: Mapping of host IDs to their current status (e.g., 'secure', 'infected', 'quarantined') and active services.
state_description.firewall_rules: List of active access control rules (source, destination, port, action).
state_description.active_alerts: Current security alerts generated by IDS/IPS systems.
state_description.intrusion_stage: The current phase of the simulated attack (e.g., 'reconnaissance', 'exploitation', 'lateral_movement', 'exfiltration').
state_description.compromised_credentials: List of user accounts or tokens currently flagged as compromised in the environment.

active_alerts: NDR_LATERAL_MOVEMENT: srv_mgmt_hub attempting RDP to dc-01 using svc_adm_auto
C2_BEACON: srv_mgmt_hub outbound traffic to 203.0.113.10 detected
